practice_info.model: Membership + fee-for-service (no insurance for FM; DPC replaces insurance)

services.name: Functional Medicine
services.description: Root-cause, whole-person approach. Advanced testing, personalized plans for nutrition, hormones, gut health, inflammation, lifestyle.

services.name: Direct Primary Care (DPC)
services.description: Membership-based primary care. No insurance. Annual wellness exam, acute care, telemedicine, medication management, same/next-day access.

services.name: DPC + Functional Medicine Membership
services.description: All DPC services + 3 FM follow-ups + 6 healing support credits + unlimited InBody scans.

services.name: IV Therapy
services.description: Hydration, vitamins, minerals, antioxidants, immune support, performance recovery. 60-min infusions.

services.name: IM Injections
services.description: Intramuscular nutrient injections. Maintenance support. 15-min appointments.

services.name: Chiropractic Services
services.description: Adjustments, soft tissue techniques, dry needling, cupping. Pain relief, injury recovery, whole-body movement.

services.name: Nutrition / Registered Dietitian
services.description: Expert nutrition guidance. Gut health, weight management, inflammation, food as medicine. Personalized to body and goals.

services.name: Mental Health Counseling
services.description: Licensed counselors. Anxiety, life transitions, burnout, chronic stress.

services.name: Pediatrics
services.description: Functional + conventional care for infants, children, teens. Development, immunity, long-term wellness.

services.name: Performance Coaching / PH Performance
services.description: Strength, recovery, movement optimization. Athletes to weekend warriors. Any age or stage.

services.name: Biometric Testing
services.description: Advanced health measurements. InBody composition analysis included in memberships.

services.name: Precision Medicine
services.description: Advanced diagnostics and personalized medicine approach.

services.name: ReShape Program
services.description: 12-week weight loss program for women. Practitioner + dietitian supported. High accountability. Weekly check-ins + support groups.

services.name: RESET Challenge
services.description: 21-day or 10-day elimination diet. Remove gluten, dairy, added sugar. Recipes by Lindsay Malone, RD.

services.name: Free Curiosity Call
services.description: Complimentary 15-min call with provider of choice. No obligation.

key_differentiators: Multi-location: 3 offices (Wadsworth OH, Willoughby OH, Sewickley PA) — growing regional footprint
Full-spectrum team: FM practitioners, DPC physicians, NPs, PAs, RDs, counselors, chiropractors, performance coaches all under one roof
IFM-certified team — multiple providers trained at Cleveland Clinic Center for Functional Medicine
Founder Sarah Cawley: breast cancer survivor who found healing through functional medicine — personal mission
Free Curiosity Call entry point — no commitment, provider of your choice
DPC membership model: $99/mo replaces primary care + insurance complexity
DPC + FM combined membership: only $219/mo for comprehensive integrated care
Inside Marigold Wellness — retreat-like flagship (not a typical clinic)
Compassion Fund — financial assistance available for patients who need it
InBody body composition scan included in memberships
